Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.plugin.model.impl

Class ApacheCommonsPolynomialFitCreatorPlugin

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.plugin.ModelCreatorPluginBase
org.aavso.tools.vstar.plugin.model.impl.ApacheCommonsPolynomialFitCreatorPlugin
All Implemented Interfaces:
IPlugin
public class ApacheCommonsPolynomialFitCreatorPlugin extends ModelCreatorPluginBase
A polynomial model creator plugin that uses an Apache Commons polynomial fitter.
